_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Classic GET /api/files returns PaginatedResult ({results, total, limit, offset, has_more}). Loom wraps in ListResponse[FileRecordLoom] and DROPS total/limit/offset siblings per the unified envelope; next_offset is computed when has_more is true. file_id replaces id at the entity primary-key level.

shape_decl.request_type: GET; query params: limit, offset, language, path_prefix, min_findings, has_severity, scan_source, sort, direction
shape_decl.rationale: FileRecordLoom = FileRecordDict with id renamed to file_id, plus summary/associations_count/observation_count from EnrichedFileItem. Pagination is real (db.list_files_paginated already supports limit/offset/total).

examples.name: empty
examples.note: Empty project → no file records yet.

body.error: Invalid value for min_findings: -1. Must be >= 0.
